title: FOOD PANTRY AND COMMUNITY GARDEN - 211info
text: JEFFERSON COMMUNITY FOOD PANTRY AND COMMUNITY GARDEN FOOD PANTRY AND COMMUNITY GARDEN Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a shopping style pantry where people can receive a 3-5 day food supply. Items that may be available include meats (frozen and canned), vegetables and fruits (fresh, frozen, and canned), fresh bread, eggs, and a variety of dry goods. Offers a seasonal community garden. People may help themselves to produce and are encouraged to participate in gardening. 310 N 2nd Street Jefferson, OR 97352 Eligibility: Pantry: Unrestricted; once a month Community Garden: Unrestricted Hours: Pantry: Wednesday 2pm-6pm Community garden: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week June-October (503) 510-7126 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 510-7126 Alternate (541) 871-8329 Wendy Samples INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, recipients must bring boxes or bags for their groceries FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Cities of Crabtree, Jefferson, Millersburg, Scio, and Talbot TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located behind the Jefferson United Methodist Church on 2nd Street (also known as 99 E) coming into town from I-5 north or south in the middle of the City of Jefferson. The food pantry is on the west side of 2nd Street, at the corner of Church Street. Services: Community Gardening Food Pantries If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
